title: postapiauthregisterstudentaccountcreation
description: Verify that a student can register successfully via POST /api/auth/register with valid student credentials, receiving a 201 response with user and token, and that the student is immediately active.

title: postapiauthregisterteacheraccountpendingapproval
description: Verify that a teacher registration via POST /api/auth/register returns a 201 response with a pending approval message, and that the teacher cannot log in before Super Admin approval.

title: postapiauthloginvalidationandauthorization
description: Verify POST /api/auth/login behavior for missing fields (400), invalid credentials (401), and blocked login for pending or rejected accounts (403).

title: getapiauthmeauthenticationrequired
description: Verify GET /api/auth/me returns 200 with user profile when called with valid token, and 401 when called without or with invalid token.

title: getapicoursespublishedlist
description: Verify GET /api/courses returns 200 with a list of published courses including teacher info and counts, accessible without authentication.

title: postapicoursescreationbyauthorizedusers
description: Verify that authenticated teachers, admins, or super admins can create a course via POST /api/courses with required title, receiving 201 response, and that missing title returns 400.

title: postapicoursesidenrollenrollmentrequest
description: Verify that authenticated students can request enrollment in a published course via POST /api/courses/:id/enroll, receiving 201 with PENDING status, and that duplicate or pending enrollments return 409.

title: putapiadminteachersidapprovebysuperadmin
description: Verify that Super Admin can approve a pending teacher account via PUT /api/admin/teachers/:id/approve, receiving 200 with updated ACTIVE status, and that non-Super Admins receive 403.

title: postapicoursescourseidlessonscreation
description: Verify that course owners or admins can create lessons via POST /api/courses/:courseId/lessons with required title and content, receiving 201, and that missing fields return 400.

title: postapitasksidsubmitbysubmittedstudent
description: Verify that accepted students can submit task responses via POST /api/tasks/:id/submit with required content, receiving 201, and that duplicate submissions return 409, missing content returns 400, and unauthorized students receive 403.
